selection_policy: stable source order after current dialog chunk punctuation mapping

runs.query_policy_description: current DMR question without evaluation-time expansion
runs.label: RRF + vectors + reranker with original query policy

gpu_memory.unavailable_reason: GPU Process Memory counters had no samples for monitored process ids

runs.query_policy_description: append question-derived content keywords twice; no gold-answer or memory access
runs.label: RRF + vectors + reranker with keyword-boost query policy

limits: This pass varies only temporary evaluation query text.
The keyword-boost policy uses question text only and does not read gold answers or memory chunks.
It does not change Synapse memory schema, recall defaults, product CLI, or ranking semantics.
Report excludes raw questions, answers, dialogs, sessions, generated text, and temporary TOML data.
Results are retrieval/ranking evidence, not official DMR answer-generation scores.
